channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | A New US-Israel Defence Bill Has Opened An Unexpected Door For India
item.description: The phrase "integration of the US and Israeli militaries" has become popular because it captures attention. It also obscures the more important story.
item.content:encoded: The phrase "integration of the US and Israeli militaries" has become popular because it captures attention. It also obscures the more important story.

item.title: India Sends Medical Aid To Kenya To Boost Ebola Readiness

media:content.media:description: India has been among the first responders during Kenya's public health emergencies. (Representational)

item.description: The initiative follows India's supply of over 45 tonnes of medical assistance to the Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention in May and June.
item.content:encoded: The initiative follows India's supply of over 45 tonnes of medical assistance to the Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention in May and June.

item.title: Iran-US War Live: Houthis Attack Saudi Tankers In Red Sea As US Hits Iran Again
item.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump had threatened to destroy an Iranian bridge or power plant for every attack on shipping in Hormuz, drawing an "eye for an eye" warning from Tehran as both sides sharpened threats in the escalating war.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump had threatened to destroy an Iranian bridge or power plant for every attack on shipping in Hormuz, drawing an "eye for an eye" warning from Tehran as both sides sharpened threats in the escalating war.

item.title: Delta Pilot Warned Of Possible 'Rocket Launcher Attack' Before Landing At LaGuardia Airport

media:content.media:description: LaGuardia Tower had issued a MANPAD alert.

item.description: The warning came from an anonymous tip phoned in to authorities. Port Authority police determined within a minute that the threat was not credible.
item.content:encoded: The warning came from an anonymous tip phoned in to authorities. Port Authority police determined within a minute that the threat was not credible.

item.title: Balen Shah Breaks His Self Imposed Diplomatic Rule For India, China: Sources

media:content.media:description: The decision comes after the Balen Shah government completed 100 days in office.

item.description: While the exact dates have yet to be announced, a senior government source in Nepal also told NDTV that this was likely to be confirmed soon.
item.content:encoded: While the exact dates have yet to be announced, a senior government source in Nepal also told NDTV that this was likely to be confirmed soon.

item.title: AI Just Solved One Of World's Toughest School Math Test Perfectly

media:content.media:description: Two Chinese companies, Huawei and Xiaohongshu, said their AI models achieved 100 percent at IMO.

item.description: Huawei's 'Celia' and RedNote's 'dots-note-3.0' each solved all six problems, months after AI models first hit gold-medal level in 2025.
item.content:encoded: Huawei's 'Celia' and RedNote's 'dots-note-3.0' each solved all six problems, months after AI models first hit gold-medal level in 2025.

item.title: UK Heatwave Cost Economy $1.5 Billion, Wiped Out 24 Million Work Hours: Study

media:content.media:description: The UK, France and other European countries saw an exceptional spell of heat in June

item.description: England's record June heatwave triggered a $1.5 billion economic hit as construction, agriculture and other workers cut hours to cope
item.content:encoded: England's record June heatwave triggered a $1.5 billion economic hit as construction, agriculture and other workers cut hours to cope

item.title: Illegal Indian Arrested In US For 'Theft' Of Lethal Powder Worth $3-Million

media:content.media:description: Kumar was arrested on charges of theft and sent to McFarland

item.description: Kumar's arrest records showed that he was caught hauling 10 pallets of stolen tungsten oxide powder, valued at $2,857,500.
item.content:encoded: Kumar's arrest records showed that he was caught hauling 10 pallets of stolen tungsten oxide powder, valued at $2,857,500.

item.title: New Zealand Hotels Book Out Ahead of First Total Solar Eclipse In More Than 850 Years

media:content.media:description: Even though the eclipse is still two years away, hotels are already receiving booking requests.

item.description: The 2028 eclipse will also be the first total solar eclipse visible from anywhere in New Zealand since 1965.
item.content:encoded: The 2028 eclipse will also be the first total solar eclipse visible from anywhere in New Zealand since 1965.

item.title: US Judge Seeks Clarity On Hegseth's Testosterone Treatment Policy For Troops

media:content.media:description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth launches new initiative to test and treat troops for low testosterone.

item.description: The judge also requested information on the Pentagon's "basis for treating trans men and other service members differently between this new policy and the Military Ban."
item.content:encoded: The judge also requested information on the Pentagon's "basis for treating trans men and other service members differently between this new policy and the Military Ban."

item.title: Sundar Pichai Defends Google's AI Strategy Amid Gemini Delays

media:content.media:description: Alphabet raised its capex plans by $15 billion to $205 billion. (Representational)

item.description: Investors are uneasy over Google delaying the release of Gemini 3.5 Pro. The call on Wednesday, Pichai struck an unusually defensive tone as analysts pressed him about Google's frontier models.
item.content:encoded: Investors are uneasy over Google delaying the release of Gemini 3.5 Pro. The call on Wednesday, Pichai struck an unusually defensive tone as analysts pressed him about Google's frontier models.

item.title: 9 Indian Fishermen Arrested By Sri Lankan Navy

media:content.media:description: Fishermen from both countries are frequently arrested for trespassing waters. (Representational)

item.description: The nine arrested fishermen and their seized trawler were handed over to the Fisheries Inspector of Mannar for further legal proceedings, the Navy said.
item.content:encoded: The nine arrested fishermen and their seized trawler were handed over to the Fisheries Inspector of Mannar for further legal proceedings, the Navy said.

item.title: 'Will Ask Shehbaz Sharif To Make Me PM': Nawaz Sharif's New PoK 'Desire'

media:content.media:description: JAAC has called for a mega protest in the region today.

item.description: Sharif claimed PoK was as important for him as his home province, Punjab. "It is my second home. My ancestors migrated from Kashmir."
item.content:encoded: Sharif claimed PoK was as important for him as his home province, Punjab. "It is my second home. My ancestors migrated from Kashmir."

item.title: 'PPE Funds To Buy Rolexes, Cars': Indian-Origin Couple's Covid Fraud In UK

media:content.media:description: The fraudsters claimed they could supply millions of boxes of nitrile gloves

item.description: The NCA's investigation found bank records showing Bhandari and his wife used the money to buy Rolexes, jewellery, holiday packages, and cars.
item.content:encoded: The NCA's investigation found bank records showing Bhandari and his wife used the money to buy Rolexes, jewellery, holiday packages, and cars.

item.title: This Epic 3500 Km Walking Trail Takes Hikers Across Six Countries

media:content.media:description: The new Wolf Trail is expected to attract long distance hikers.

item.description: A new 3,494 km hiking route called the Wolf Trail has opened across six European countries, offering experienced walkers a journey from Poland to Italy that can take up to six months to complete.
item.content:encoded: A new 3,494 km hiking route called the Wolf Trail has opened across six European countries, offering experienced walkers a journey from Poland to Italy that can take up to six months to complete.

item.title: FBI Arrests Indian National Harmanveer Singh In Drug Trafficking Case

media:content.media:description: The FBI has arrested Harmanveer Singh, an Indian national, for his alleged role in drug trafficking

item.description: Officers with the California Highway Patrol arrested Harmanveer Singh in Stockton on Tuesday, weeks after a federal warrant was issued in June.
item.content:encoded: Officers with the California Highway Patrol arrested Harmanveer Singh in Stockton on Tuesday, weeks after a federal warrant was issued in June.

item.title: Trump's 50% Tariff Threat May Hurt Canada But Could Be Negotiation Tactic: Experts

media:content.media:description: The US threat of 50% tariffs on Canadian goods will have a ripple effect on the country's economy

item.description: Desjardins economist Randall Bartlett estimates the tariffs could shave two to three tenths of a percent off Canada's growth in 2026 and 2027.
item.content:encoded: Desjardins economist Randall Bartlett estimates the tariffs could shave two to three tenths of a percent off Canada's growth in 2026 and 2027.

item.title: Tesla Profit Falls As Musk Ramps Up Spending On AI, Robotaxis

media:content.media:description: Musk says Tesla's ambitious robotaxi and AI infrastructure spending will pay off.

item.description: Tesla's second-quarter profit dropped 12% as R&D spending jumped 49%, even as revenue and vehicle sales beat Wall Street expectations
item.content:encoded: Tesla's second-quarter profit dropped 12% as R&D spending jumped 49%, even as revenue and vehicle sales beat Wall Street expectations

item.title: British Airways Launches Probe After 3 Pilots Fall Sick Mid-Air After Hyderabad Stopover

media:content.media:description: The incident involved British Airways flight BA276, which departed Hyderabad for London.

item.description: The airline is now reviewing its hotel arrangements in Hyderabad as part of the investigation while authorities work to establish what led to the suspected food poisoning.
item.content:encoded: The airline is now reviewing its hotel arrangements in Hyderabad as part of the investigation while authorities work to establish what led to the suspected food poisoning.

item.title: Iran-US War News Highlights: US Strikes Iran For 12th Consecutive Night

media:content.media:description: Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has largely stalled

item.description: US-Iran War News Highlights: The US State Department has issued an alert urging American citizens around the world to "exercise increased caution" over the war with Iran. The alert said that "due to heightened tensions in the Middle East.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Highlights: The US State Department has issued an alert urging American citizens around the world to "exercise increased caution" over the war with Iran. The alert said that "due to heightened tensions in the Middle East.
